author: vincenzocaputo
description: Create notes about metal bands and album from Metal Archives.

manifest.author: Vincenzo Caputo
manifest.description: Create notes about metal bands and album from Metal Archives
manifest.name: Metal Archives (Unofficial)

name: Metal Archives (Unofficial)

releases.author: vincenzocaputo
releases.description:
- Add album title to note body as H1 header
- Add band name to the note as H1 header
- Add headings to band members table
- Fix empty discography table creation bug
- Remove disallowed characters from file names when creating new notes

releases.author: vincenzocaputo
releases.description:
- Added settings options to specify the type of albums to include in the discography section in the band notes (main, lives, demos and/or misc.)
- The album names in the band's discography section are now internal links pointing to the corresponding album notes
 - If you click on an unresolved album name link, as the note does not exist, the plugin will automatically create it.
- Added setting to allow updating of band notes.
- Added reference URLs to metal archives pages
- Fix album covers size

releases.author: vincenzocaputo
releases.description: Initial release of the Metal-Archives Plugin.
